title: Any Underrated Merchandise People
wikitext:
[]: Any Underrated Merchandise, People?             Quote Post by ColonelRudoji » Thu Aug 12, 2010 4:01 am Told myself I wouldn't post here again; I don't really like the fans of things I like, like Evangelion, Star Wars, Valve games, etc. But Hell, I'll give it another chance. For some crazy reason, I think there's a lot of underrated merchandise in the EVA genre, and I want to see if any of us can do them justice with good photos instead of crappy vendor photos from Amazon and such. My Revoltechs (all two of them) don't suffer from this, but my recent Evangelion Collection Volume 1 statuette did pretty bad. So I tried my best: http://a.imageshack.us/img801/852/lilithstatue.jpg I know; it looks like a basement dweller had too much time on hand. But I was surprised at the detail on such a tiny PVC figurine! And there are no good photos of this baby online, considering it's one of the few non-custom figures of Giant Rei/Lilith available. ... God? Did I really just blab all that? Oh well. In short: can people post cool photos of their stuff? I used a cheap digital camera and a tripod from the late 80s, so... yeah XD

[]: This post brought to you by ImageShack: Imagine Greater.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Aug 12, 2010 9:35 am ColonelRudoji wrote: Told myself I wouldn't post here again; I don't really like the fans of things I like, like Evangelion, Star Wars, Valve games, etc. But Hell, I'll give it another chance.

[]:             Quote Post by ColonelRudoji » Thu Aug 12, 2010 1:46 pm Yeah, Good point about the thread. I was just thinking that some of the existing merchandise is definitely legitimate. I mean, for example, the Puchi Eva stuff I've seen is awesomely cute, but the actual show itself is... God why? Or the children's action figure series that get overshadowed by their Revoltech counterparts. Somebody's got to have some neat images they can create with those. And Bee, there's so much about those Mari Revoltech photos that I'm in love with. The fact that she can perform one of the greatest memes of all time, the Gendo, is breathtaking <3

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Aug 12, 2010 2:21 pm The only really nice figure that I have that I think is underrated is one of Asuka I got 4 or so years ago. I can't remember who made it. A better picture is here but you don't see much: http://www.tesuji.org/images/eva_um_figures.png

[]: Re: This post brought to you by ImageShack: Imagine Greater.             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Aug 12, 2010 2:33 pm Killer Bee wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ColonelRudoji » Thu Aug 12, 2010 2:37 pm Ornette wrote: The only really nice figure that I have that I think is underrated is one of Asuka I got 4 or so years ago. I can't remember who made it. A better picture is here but you don't see much: http://www.tesuji.org/images/eva_um_figures.png

[]: Re: This post brought to you by ImageShack: Imagine Greater.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Aug 12, 2010 5:15 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Ah -- the classic "let the table take the strain" pose.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Aug 12, 2010 6:27 pm I really love the attention to detail in the following figures of mine (not poseable ones, but whatever. It's also nice to have some figures to display through the box): Banpresto Puchi Eva figures: (This picture was taken back in May.) There's also a Rei in the school uniform set, I didn't get a chance to nab her yet. Maybe at Fanime next year... Sega "Take care of yourself" figures: IIRC, there's also a Kaworu in this set? I got these as a gift ages ago so... I'm not really sure. Kotobukiya figures: The Asuka figure is based on a scene in Sadamoto's manga (during the unison training), the Rei figure is based on a picture of her and Shinji in the Die Strene artbook. I'm not sure why the Rei image came out looking so odd, but I assure you, the quality of the figure is fantastic. Regarding other merchandise... I'm not sure if it's underrated as much as expensive and good quality but things by Cospla such their Eva t-shirts or pilot Interface Headsets are wonderful.

[]:             Quote Post by ColonelRudoji » Thu Aug 12, 2010 7:30 pm I love the outfit the Rei with the bike has. I have Der Mond; still need to get Die Strene. XP And the Rei/Lilith I have is a pain in the butt to clearly photograph in the package. Too shiny. But it's also distributed by SEGA. I saw this shirt once with Unit 01, that said something like Mankind has in himself his greatest friend and enemy. It'd certainly make a statement in the backwater hellhole where I live XD AND YAY! LET'S HAVE PUCHI EVA ADVENTURES TOGETHER AND SCAR OUR KIDS FOR LIFE! God I love those chibi buggers <3

[]: I guess I could put a blue wig on him or something...             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Aug 12, 2010 8:48 pm ColonelRudoji wrote: AND YAY! LET'S HAVE PUCHI EVA ADVENTURES TOGETHER AND SCAR OUR KIDS FOR LIFE! God I love those chibi buggers <3

[]: Re: I guess I could put a blue wig on him or something...             Quote Post by ColonelRudoji » Thu Aug 12, 2010 8:52 pm Killer Bee wrote: This is the only one I have. I payed $19 for a sealed box, hoping to get either Asuka or one of the four Reis . I thought, "Hey, out of the nine figures in the set, there's only one I don't really want. STATISTICS ARE ON MY SIDE!" Guess which one I get? Oh, Unit-01... why do you have to be so hideous?

[]:             Quote Post by xark » Fri Aug 13, 2010 1:30 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Banpresto Puchi Eva figures: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 13, 2010 12:43 pm I found them on Play Asia , but it looks like they're out of stock: http://www.play-asia.com/paOS-13-71-8x-49-en-70-3ofk.html Asuka http://www.play-asia.com/paOS-13-71-8x-49-en-70-3ofj.html Shinji BUT you can always sign up for a "let me know when this is in stock" notification. I guess they are hard to come by because they were limited availability. (Glad I got them when I did. )

[]:             Quote Post by ColonelRudoji » Fri Aug 13, 2010 2:22 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I found them on Play Asia , but it looks like they're out of stock: http://www.play-asia.com/paOS-13-71-8x-49-en-70-3ofk.html Asuka http://www.play-asia.com/paOS-13-71-8x-49-en-70-3ofj.html Shinji BUT you can always sign up for a "let me know when this is in stock" notification. I guess they are hard to come by because they were limited availability. (Glad I got them when I did. )

[]: Re: Any Underrated Merchandise, People?             Quote Post by Riotgear » Sun Aug 15, 2010 6:14 am ColonelRudoji wrote: I was surprised at the detail on such a tiny PVC figurine! And there are no good photos of this baby online, considering it's one of the few non-custom figures of Giant Rei/Lilith available.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Aug 15, 2010 11:13 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Banpresto Puchi Eva figures: (This picture was taken back in May.) There's also a Rei in the school uniform set, I didn't get a chance to nab her yet. Maybe at Fanime next year...

[]: Re: Any Underrated Merchandise, People?             Quote Post by ColonelRudoji » Mon Aug 16, 2010 4:47 am Riotgear wrote: Really great photos. Makes me want that figure - I wasn't aware the detail was that good.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 02, 2015 8:55 pm I'm gonna bump this thread, because I'm curious: what are some Eva goods that these days folks honestly consider underrated--since there's such a huge selection of Eva merch out there? I'm not in a position to buy anything soon, just curious. Though, I might get something in the Summer or Fall if some really cool 20th Anniversary/2015 Merch comes out. This makes me miss my babies . Had to sell or donate them due to moving. At least I still have the Shinji/Asuka Unison training Puchi Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Jan 04, 2015 6:46 pm Something that I don't see discussed when it comes to books is E-Mono . It should be on the shelf of any collector, whether serious or not and maybe looking to become serious (unless you are strictly Rebuild or only focusing on merch from ~1998 on only), since it catalogs what was released since the series began up through about 1997. You can see that even back then the [s]merchandising[/s] pimping was in full force. Guaranteed to inspire wonder, I wish I was in Japan with the $$$ back then thoughts, some self-loathing for not getting into the series sooner, why didn't I pick up x when I saw it at the time, or all of the above. On the flip side in my experience, is that much of the older merch from this time period that I've obtained was acquired for less than than what it was originally priced at. E-Mono is the most referred to book in my collection and since it's a catalog, is great for non-Japanese readers.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Jan 04, 2015 6:51 pm 2nding E-Mono. Fantastic reference book for old merch. It has come in incredibly handy with my model kit addiction.

For some crazy reason, I think there's a lot of underrated merchandise in the EVA genre, and I want to see if any of us can do them justice with good
